headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (TMO) Positioned for Robust Growth on AI Integration and Acquisition Boost
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) is one of Goldman Sachs top healthcare stocks.
